case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. RAUL DELGADO DELGADO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO, RAUL DELGADO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: MARIA BLANC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELGADO, RAUL DELGADO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,595.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $45.00) SERVED JUN-21-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO, RAUL DELGADO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-18-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FOR OPORTUN INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RAUL DELGADO DELGADO. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
